opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up feeling like I've been hit by a truck, my whole body aches, and my fingers are so puffed up they look like sausages. I'm so wiped out I've barely been able to get off the couch all afternoon and I'm scared something is really wrong inside.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The aching and swelling and exhaustion all came on today and I'm frightened it means my organs are failing or something serious is happening.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on today — woke up feeling terrible and it got worse through the day
symptom_narrative.character: deep all-over body aching, muscles sore, hands puffy and swollen, and a heavy bone-tired exhaustion
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the exhaustion is the worst part — I've felt largely stuck on the couch since the afternoon
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: aches all over my body and muscles; swelling in both hands and fingers
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant today, worse as the day went on
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — resting hasn't fixed it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around, and I feel too drained to do anything
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no cough, no trouble breathing, no chest pain, no fevers or chills that I've noticed, and no new rashes
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had milder aches and puffy fingers before but never a hit this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've only got up for essential things; I've barely eaten today because I feel so wiped out and a bit off

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: some kind of connective tissue / autoimmune thing — I was told I have an antibody in my blood called anti-U1 RNP, but they said my case has been mild
past_medical_history.how_managed: monitored, usually mild — no regular medication

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: anti-inflammatory tablets (over-the-counter) now and then for aches

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; hasn't eaten much today because of the exhaustion and feeling nauseous

communication_style.typical_message_style: worried, catastrophising about serious internal illness

objective_data_offered.value: both hands and all the fingers look diffusely puffy and swollen, 'like sausages'; not red or shiny
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own view over video; no clinician palpation of the joints

objective_data_offered.value: appears very tired and is moving slowly and stiffly, but sitting up and talking in full sentences without gasping
feels a bit warm on and off but has not measured a temperature and hasn't noticed shivering
